Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: piercing tools [300024788], equipment by process [300024659], equipment [300122241], Tools and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300022238], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Sharp metal points with wood handles; used to make small holes in wood or leather.
Scherpe, metalen punten met houten handvatten. Worden gebruikt om kleine gaten te maken in hout of leer.
Scharfe Metallspitze mit Holzgriff; wird verwendet, um kleine Löcher in Holz oder Leder zu stechen.
أدوات معدنية حادة بمقابض خشبية؛ تستخدم لعمل ثقوب صغيرة في الخشب أو الجلد.

Source.Source_ID: 2000018191/Diagram Group and Midgley, Handtools of Arts and Crafts (1981)
